preconditions: WP-001 build foundation is present on main
no external runtime dependency is required
acceptance_criteria: one canonical schema generates roles capabilities messages routes limits and process capability documentation
restart-safe identities reject stale process epochs
capabilities can be attenuated but not escalated
message routes and sender capabilities are deny-by-default
messages queues processes and channels have explicit bounds
sequence failures do not advance channel state
generation drift formatting lint tests shell integration and documentation validation pass
limitations remain explicit and no production security claim is made
only a process-broker principal can register a channel before messages use it
queue byte accounting uses the immutable charge captured at admission

rollback.strategy: close the pull request or revert its squash commit; generated outputs are regenerated from the prior schema
evidence_required: no schema or generated output from TASK-000001 remains after rollback
